_comment: Deterministic post-translation corrections applied on every run (tools/fixups.py). 'normalize' unifies terminology globally; 'literal' fixes specific model slips. Applied AFTER translation but anchor integrity is re-derived, so heading-affecting normalizations stay link-safe.
